name: GRADRAG: Cross-Component Prompt Adaptation for Coordinated Multi-Agent RAG
summary: arXiv:2607.21324v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems increasingly employ multiple LLM agents. Yet, most prior work optimizes components in isolation rather...
description: arXiv:2607.21324v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems increasingly employ multiple LLM agents. Yet, most prior work optimizes components in isolation rather than coordinating improvements across the pipeline. We introduce GRADRAG, a framework for cross-component prompt adaptation that models the RAG pipeline as a computational graph and propagates struct...
author: Paolo Pedinotti, Enrico Santus
